name: Meet the winners of Solana Grizzlython
snippet: Over 10000 participants submitted 813 final projects, the largest Solana hackathon to date.

name: Welcome to Grizzlython, the next Solana Hackathon
snippet: The Solana Foundation is excited to announce Grizzlython, an online, global Solana hackathon with $5 million in prizes and seed funding.

name: GRIZZLYTHON: Online Hackathon | HackerEarth developer event
snippet: Take part in the GRIZZLYTHON conducted by Solana Foundation on HackerEarth. Showcase your skills at the hackathon and win amazing prizes. Register now!

name: Meet the winners of Solana Grizzlython | Steven Arellano - LinkedIn
snippet: + Special congrats to the Student Winners: Steven Arellano, John Hahn and Lucas Rosa !! Meet the winners of Solana Grizzlython solana.com.

name: Solana Hyperdrive Hackathon - DoraHacks
snippet: The previous hackathon, Grizzlython, saw over 10,000 participants submit 800 projects. Projects will be eligible for: GRAND CHAMPION ...

name: Meet the winners of Solana Grizzlython
snippet: Participants from over 70 countries. The @SolanaFndn is pleased to announce the winners of Grizzlython, the 7th Solana Hackathon.
